user.title: Connect to SMART Sniffer Agent
user.description: Enter the connection details for the SMART Sniffer agent running on the target machine.

data_description.host: IP address or hostname of the machine running the SMART Sniffer agent.
data_description.port: HTTP port the agent is listening on (default 9099).
data_description.token: Leave blank if the agent has no auth configured.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll the agent for updated SMART data.

data_description.token: Enter the bearer token if auth is enabled on this agent. Leave blank otherwise.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the SMART Sniffer agent. Check the host, port, and token.

abort.already_configured: This SMART Sniffer agent is already configured.

init.title: SMART Sniffer Settings
init.description: Adjust connection and polling settings. The host cannot be changed — remove and re-add the integration to change it.

data_description.port: HTTP port the agent is listening on.
data_description.token: Leave blank if the agent has no auth configured.
data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll for updated SMART data (in seconds).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect with the new settings. Check the port and token.

get_drive_data.name: Get Drive Data
get_drive_data.description: Returns the full cached SMART data for all drives monitored by a SMART Sniffer agent. Useful for passing raw drive health data to an AI for analysis.

config_entry_id.name: Config Entry
config_entry_id.description: The SMART Sniffer agent to query.

agent_outdated.title: SMART Sniffer: Update agent on {hostname} (v{current_version} → v{min_version})
agent_outdated.description:
The agent on **{hostname}** is running version **{current_version}**, but this integration requires at least **{min_version}**.

To update, SSH into the host and run:
```
curl -sSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/DAB-LABS/smart-sniffer/main/install.sh | sudo bash
```
The installer will detect the existing installation and upgrade in place. This repair will clear automatically once the agent reports a compatible version.
